query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A person wearing glasses and a short-sleeved shirt stands in profile in a brightly lit vertical opening beside a solid dark surface. The figure faces right with hands held together at waist level. A second figure appears nearby, partially visible between the first figure and the dark area. The photograph is rendered in black and white.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image employs extreme exposure contrast to render a person wearing glasses and a short-sleeved shirt as a severe black silhouette standing in a doorway, with blown-out highlights behind them and deep crushing blacks consuming the right half of the frame. A ghostly, semi-transparent duplicate figure overlaps the scene beside the subject, created through double exposure. The juxtaposition produces a surreal, dreamlike presence and a disquieting atmosphere filled with dread and visual tension.
